name: 婚禮戒指危機
description: 失明新郎在眾目睽睽下找不到新娘的手、戒指掉落，賓客議論紛紛，女主救場幫他戴上戒指。公開場合的尷尬與默契配合形成強烈的視覺戲劇性。
tags: 公眾場合暴露秘密的恐懼 vs 兩人第一次默契配合

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: She has a ring hand out. The ring is in your left pocket. Uh, lower, higher, higher. Right there. What's going on with the ring? You missed completely. The ring. It drops. Told you Christian is blind. You're welcome.
examples.context: 公眾場合暴露秘密的恐懼 vs 兩人第一次默契配合
